title: Toolchain Selection, Compatibility, and Reproducible Setup · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Select a minimal compatible toolchain and prove clean-machine setup. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a pinned bootstrap and compatibility matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin supported runtime and package-manager versions with one authoritative source.
Commit appropriate lockfiles and verify deterministic clean installs.
Choose tools with clear ownership and minimal duplicate diagnostics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.
